reviews.review_description: StoryUp VR videos take a viewer to interesting places.  Aging senior veterans can visit the WWII Veterans Memorial, the Women Veterans Memorial, the Vietnam Veterans Memorial, and soon the Korean War Veterans Memorial through the magic of VR...and they can do this without leaving home!  What a great use of leading edge technology.

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying it. Be sure to download our free Honor Everywhere and Healium apps as well.

reviews.review_description: All it does is loading won't load all the way STOP don't have time to sit and wait for it to keep loading not worth the time

developer_response.body: Sorry Patty that happened. Downloading over a faster wifi connection will speed up the process. Once you download the video once...you won't need wifi again to view it as the app is designed to work without wifi after the initial video downloads. Click "download HQ" under the video thumbnail not "stream". Regardless, we appreciate you taking the time to see our stories and thank you for sharing your experience.

reviews.review_description: Some issues with installing and videos are slow to load but great resource!
